_README: eBird speciesCode -> crop override for data/thumbs/<code>.webp. The default is a punchy 'attention' square crop (see frame/scripts/build-thumbnails.mjs). Override only the ones that look wrong: "contain" = show the whole photo letterboxed on the card colour; [fx,fy] = focal point (0..1 of the source) the square centres on; a gravity string = "north"/"south"/"east"/"west"/"centre"/"entropy". A species with no entry uses the default, so photos added later are handled automatically.
